title: Living in Boulder Vlog 2 - 17 - 2017: Area Circles Background

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs about his day in Boulder, which included shampooing his car at his mom's house for hours. He explains the 'area circles' background used in his videos — concentric rings doubling in size starting at 500 meters, meant to give viewers a spatial sense of scale when traveling. He also vents about feeling overwhelmed trying to start too many projects simultaneously: biking, acting/a show, and his website, which has multiple unfinished pages.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Should have done it long ago; it's time-consuming but worth it
Useful tool for calibrating geographic scale; plans to make videos for each size from different world locations
Feels overwhelmed trying to start biking, acting, and website work all at once; things feel like they're falling apart
It's a mess — multiple unfinished pages; needs to be fixed before he can move forward
